tool_schema.name: lookup_order
tool_schema.description: Look up order details by order ID. Returns order information including product name, purchase date, amount, and return eligibility. Use this to check if a customer's order can be returned.

order_id.description: The order ID to look up (e.g., ORD-001, ORD-002, ORD-003)

sample_orders: ORD-003: Samsung Galaxy Tab S8 (defective, eligible)
